name: Prisoner of Love
original_name: เจ้าสาวจำเลย
overview: When Ingjan escapes an arranged marriage meant to settle her family's debt, she strikes a deal with Sichon, a stern vineyard owner. He offers to pay off the debt if she agrees to a one-year marriage and gives him a child. But Ingjan isn’t one to be controlled, and the battle of wills begins.

trailers.title: เจ้าสาวจำเลย [Official Trailer]
